name: Lemon Chicken B1
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the chicken breasts of any fat and sinew.
2. Season each piece with salt and pepper.
3. Prepare the batter by combining the flours and baking powder in a bowl.
4. Beat the egg with water, then quickly beat these liquid ingredients into the dry ones.
5. In a double boiler, combine the marmalade and lemonade concentrate to make a sauce. Mix until smooth.
6. Heat oil to 375°F (190°C) in a shallow frying pan.
7. Dip chicken breasts in the batter and place them in the oil.
8. Reduce heat to 325°F (165°C) and fry the breasts, turning frequently, for 2-3 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Pour the heated sauce over the chicken breasts and serve at once.
